# openai_group (Resource)

Manage an organization group.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "openai_group" "example" {
  name = "terraform-managed"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) name

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (Number) created at
- `group_id` (String) group id
- `group_type` (String) group type
- `id` (String) id
- `is_scim_managed` (Boolean) is scim managed
